title: 3D Tower Defense in Unity
subtitle: Unity | Tower Defense | Hero Combat | AI Enemies
content: An ongoing project and devlog series for a tower defense game made using Unity and C#
description: Ready to defend your village against a horde of rampaging goblins!? You are the village's last hope of an organized defense. Build towers and lay traps to successfully defend. The village has a variety to provide with mages and archers! But the horde is equally well equipped to fight! Lets see who wins! The hunger of the horde or the determination and grit to survive of humans!

highlights.name: Playable Hero Character
highlights.detail: Players control a hero with unique combat abilities alongside traditional tower placement, adding an active gameplay layer.

highlights.name: Enemy AI
highlights.detail: Enemies navigate using Unity NavMesh and state machines, dynamically switching targets between the hero and the base.

highlights.name: Tower Placement System
highlights.detail: Two tower types — single-target and area-effect — can be placed strategically to defend the base.

highlights.name: Tile Editor Integration
highlights.detail: Levels are built using a custom-made tile editor tool, demonstrating the tool in a live game context.

highlights.name: Modular Architecture
highlights.detail: Codebase designed for easy expansion of enemy types, tower types, and hero abilities.

roles: Designed and developed as a solo project
Designed the game concept, enemy waves, and tower mechanics
Implemented all gameplay systems: hero character, AI enemies, tower placement, and abilities
Built modular, expandable code and integrated 3D assets and animations
Integrated the custom tile editor tool for level building
details: This ongoing project entails the development of a 3D Tower Defense game utilizing Unity and C#. The game revolves around defending your base/town hall against waves of incoming enemies. In addition to traditional tower placement, players have the ability to control a playable character (hero) equipped with various abilities to defeat enemies. Currently, the game features only one type of enemy (melee). The Enemy AI is designed to locate the town hall and move towards it with the intention of destruction. They can switch targets, attacking the player hero character when incoming and reverting to targeting the town hall once the hero is defeated. This system is implemented using Unity Navmesh Agent, Pathfinding, and State Machines. The user interface (UI) comprises simple buttons for tower placement, offering a choice between two types: Single Target and Area Effect Towers. Additionally, the UI enables the selection of player abilities during gameplay. While the game is being developed primarily for the PC platform, it can be seamlessly adapted for mobile platforms. The provided link directs to the latest video in the development log; for a comprehensive view of the entire process, please subscribe to the YouTube channel.
